learnings: docs/solutions/best-practices/format-pairing-cross-format-position-translation-2026-04-25.md: Never call ABS chapter endpoints during library sync (N+1 fan-out). Followed — item-level metadata from list endpoint is used for format detection.

docs/solutions/best-practices/audiobook-prefs-hydration-allow-list-pattern-2026-04-25.md: Treat external format values as untrusted input. Gate with allow-list membership checks. Followed — VALID_FORMATS allow-list guards the format before storing.

docs/solutions/sync/abs-sync-qa-fix-patterns-2026-04-24.md: Auth guards must short-circuit sync cycles on failed credentials. Followed — Bearer auth failure in BookContentService throws RemoteEpubError with isCachedVersion fallback.
docs/solutions/sync/e96-closeout-sync-patterns-2026-04-19.md: Per-row read-before-write during hydration prevents bulkPut from clobbering locally-set fields. Not directly relevant to this diff.
